home.title: Korean Cosmetics B2B·B2C
home.description: Introduce skincare and makeup brands to global buyers and customers. Check MOQ, wholesale, and retail pricing in one place.
home.b2bDescription: Check MOQ wholesale pricing and stock, and respond to buyer inquiries
home.b2cDescription: Retail pricing, cart, and ordering for global consumers
home.exportDescription: Korean cosmetics export and distribution partnerships

footer.copyright: © K-Beauty Shop · Korean cosmetics export platform

products.emptyConfigured: Run supabase/seed.sql or add products in the admin panel.
products.emptyUnconfigured: Configure .env.local and run seed SQL to show database products.
products.supabaseWarning: Supabase not connected — showing sample product data.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Browse K-Beauty export categories. B2B and B2C supported.
categories.supabaseWarning: Supabase not connected — showing sample categories. Configure .env.local and run seed SQL for database data.
categories.emptyDb: No categories in the database. Please run supabase/seed.sql.
categories.emptyDescription: Add categories in the admin panel or run seed SQL.

about.title: Company Overview
about.introSuffix: is a subsidiary of a Korean trading company and an export-focused platform supporting B2B wholesale and B2C retail for K-Beauty products.
about.area1: Global buyer matching and wholesale supply for Korean beauty brands
about.area2: B2B ordering and inventory management based on MOQ and wholesale pricing
about.area3: Online retail and shipping support for overseas consumers
about.area4: Export documents, customs, and logistics partner support (upon consultation)
about.shopDescription: This store is a digital channel operated by K-Beauty Global to help buyers and consumers check product catalogs, pricing, and ordering in one place.

orderConfirmation.demoHint: If Stripe keys are missing, this runs in demo mode (no payment).

cart.title: Cart
cart.loggedInHint: Signed in — items are saved in Supabase cart_items.
cart.demoHint: Demo mode — cookie-based cart with sample product IDs.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in with your K-Beauty Shop account
auth.signupSuccess: Sign-up request completed. Please verify your email and then log in.

account.title: My Account
account.adminNotice: Admin account — shown as Admin in the header.
account.nicknameDescription: Set the name shown in the store header.
account.nicknameHint: Customer accounts show this nickname in the header.
account.nicknameTooLong: Nickname must be 30 characters or fewer.
